changes.reason: Distinct high-value failure cluster for local Mac or Windows backups and computer restores; existing canonical iCloud-storage article does not cover this primary intent.

canonicalReview.notes: The iCloud canonical is centered on cloud capacity; the computer-recognition canonical is centered on device discovery and Trust alerts. This article covers the full local-backup and restore failure path after distinguishing recognition, trust, software, storage, security software, and compatibility branches. Full title, summary, symptoms, aliases, devices, platforms, errorMessages, officialTerms, communityTerms, and canonical corpus matching found no duplicate intent.
